scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace packages/xai-client && npm run build --workspace packages/core && npm run build --workspace packages/mcp-server
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace apps/cli
scripts.pack:cli: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && npm pack --workspace apps/cli --json --pack-destination ./.artifacts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/xai-client && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/core && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/cli
